[[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Evolutonism Wiki:Speak English]][[sn:Evolutonism Wiki:Speak English]]Use simple words that can be understood by any audience. Ideally a guy with basic English comprehension from Kenya should be able to read this wiki and get enlightened. No using fancy words like [[Anagoge]], just use [[Advancing]] instead.

Recent events indicated we need to get more serious on this
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
